title: lancisia coronopifolia
intro: Lancisia coronopifolia, also known as the Button Everlasting, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lancisia coronopifolia include its potential to alleviate symptoms of anxiety, depression, and insomnia, as well as its ability to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Lancisia coronopifolia can be made by infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's extracts in capsule or tincture form.
